title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXVII. Jingles.
content:
Feedum, fiddledum fee,
        The cat's got into the tree.
            Pussy, come down,
            Or I'll crack your crown,
        And toss you into the sea.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXVII. Jingles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
